summary: Session 4 (Out-of-band self-completing verification, Feature 3 + A12 + S1 bundle F) complete. Canonical doc: docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/cross-provider-verification.md.template authored (engine-facing: inputs, devil's-advocate stance with materiality bar, VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND(+severities)/WAIVED(+required reason, same-or-immediately-next-line) grammar, Scope: specification round marker, the required write-the-artifact output, Copilot second-chat/model-picker recipe); wired into the TemplateBundle and both scaffold render paths (renders to docs/dabbler/cross-provider-verification.md), and ensure-written/refreshed idempotently by the extension before every Evaluate prompt (ensureCrossProviderVerificationDoc, critique M2 - the installed base needs no re-bootstrap). Prompts (A2/A9): the three Evaluate prompts rewritten pointer-style - shared opener naming the canonical doc plus the one-line missing-doc fallback, bodies shrunk to a Scope paragraph, criteria trailer preserved with a new 8000-char size guard, and a shared non-negotiable close naming the exact external-verification.md path the reviewing engine itself must write (the spec-review variant additionally instructs Scope: specification so a pre-work plan review cannot launder the gate - the S4 code-review auto-verify Major, fixed in-session); openExternalVerificationDoc seeds a dated Round-1/Verdict: PENDING header instead of an empty file. Parser: new ai_router/external_verification.py (dated round sections, latest round wins, severity tags, WAIVED requires an adjacent reason, malformed later WAIVED nulls the round verdict, scope-aware, PENDING deliberately unrecognized; 32 unit tests) - the single parser both the S4 gate and the S5 banner consume. Gates: (A3, root cause) close_session.run() resolves Lightweight mode once per set via _resolve_no_router_for_run (CLI > env > spec; deliberately cache-immune for multi-set processes) and threads it through the attestation, method, and soft-gate branches - spec/env-activated Lightweight sets now get the gate, and main() no longer swallows resolution errors silently; (A4) the soft gate is content-aware but still soft (empty/unreadable/verdict-less/spec-scoped-only files warn like absence; WAIVED passes with its reason voiced; ISSUES_FOUND passes with a loud remediation-owed note); (A8) the gate stands down when read_verification_mode records dedicated-sessions. Mechanical hardening (S1 bundle D): RESULT_TO_EXIT_CODE['aborted_at_soft_gate']=4, TOCTOU _is_already_closed re-check inside the lock, close_is_terminal computed once for the dv/pac/contract gate chain, corrective guidance printed before the interactive [y/N]. A12: _backfill_payload disambiguates on activity-log entries length (cleanly-parsed empty => not-started; legacy shapes conservative) with authored-today regression tests through both backfill and the read_status lazy-synth path. Bundle F landed in full (defer-with-reason was allowed but not needed): four boundary writers + both activity-log finalizers routed through _atomic_write_json with a Windows os.replace PermissionError retry (3x50ms), read_raw_session_state narrowed to (FileNotFoundError, JSONDecodeError, UnicodeError) so PermissionError propagates, register_session_start refuses re-opening a completed session, backfill TOCTOU re-check, _finalize max-not-len; one v2 test fixture corrected (it abused force=True for a mid-set close). Routed code-review (opus + gpt-5.4 auto-verify, raw in s4-code-review.md): the auto-verify Major (spec-review gate laundering) fixed via the parser-visible Scope marker; opus's Critical and one Major refuted with evidence (prior_completed initialized above the hunk; PermissionError propagation is spec-mandated); Minors applied (stale main() comment, resolution below repair short-circuit, backfill return-contract docstring, WAIVED adjacency documented). Verification (gpt-5.4): round 1 ISSUES_FOUND (underscore-emphasis normalization; WAIVED blank-line looseness) - fixed; round 2 (narrow) found the malformed-WAIVED-nulls-earlier-verdict edge - fixed; round 3 clean in substance; round 4 the L-064-7 schema-only restatement with max_tier pinned: VERIFIED. Suites at close: pytest 2317/5/0 (final full run green, incl. the verification-round regression tests), tsc clean, mocha 1050 passing, Playwright 19/19 serial local, drift guard green incl. dist-in-sync.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis at S4 close (gemini-pro) confirmed the standing S5 recommendation: Session 5's mix is tightly-coupled Python backend (engine-or-provider gate, start-time refusal, typed-path capture calls, the pending-verification banner consuming this session's parser) and TypeScript frontend (mode-record precedence, owed-state auto-routing) - the cross-stack state-consistency case the standing Claude Code claude-fable-5 @ effort=high recommendation was selected for, with a three-session track record.
